CreateIpAddressFamily.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateIpAddressFamily.name: Name of the IP address family. Allowed characters: letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -_/. Must start with a letter or Chinese character. Length: 1–65.
CreateIpAddressFamily.ipVersion: IP version. Valid values: IPv4, IPv6.
CreateIpAddressFamily.ipSetIds: IDs of associated IP address groups. Their ipVersion must match the one specified for this IP address family. Maximum 5 IDs per request.
CreateIpAddressFamily.description: Description of the IP address family. Maximum length: 255 characters.
